current_dau.note: Recovered from lows of 400K after decline from 1.7M peak in 2025

historical_dau.note: Ranked 3rd globally after Solana (4.4M) and BNB Chain (1.49M)

daily_active_users.dau_quality: HIGH VOLUME BUT QUALITY CONCERNS - many attributed to gaming/airdrop farming bots

current_mau.note: Peaked early 2025, since declined - volatile retention

dau_mau_ratio.interpretation: POOR RETENTION - ratio well below 0.1 threshold indicates mostly one-time/ephemeral users

dex_volume.recent_milestone: Flipped Base in daily DEX trading volume

staked_percentage_of_circulating.interpretation: HIGH LOCKING - more than half of circulating SUI locked in staking

total_supply_unlocked.note: 39.53% of total 10B token supply unlocked as of April 2026

april_2026_unlock.market_impact: Smaller than other major events but part of recurring dilution cycle

inflow_april_27_2026.interpretation: MODEST - limited institutional buying during unlock period

organic_estimate.description: Core DeFi users, genuine governance participation, yield farming with real economic intent

farmed_bot_traffic.description: Gaming airdrops (SuiPlay0X1), airdrop farming, wash trading on certain DEXs, inscription bots

evidence_of_farming: Gaming ecosystem drives large percentage of DAU (SuiPlay0X1 infrastructure, G Dollar stablecoin for gaming)
Q2 2025 airdrop landscape highly active with ~$3k/wallet airdrop distributions
Airdrop farming explicitly noted as primary driver for marginal users
DEX volume surges correlated with new airdrop announcements and farming opportunities
High DAU (1.2-2.46M) relative to modest TVL (~$2.1B DeFi) indicates volume inflation
DAU/MAU ratio of 0.03 shows ephemeral user base typical of airdrop chasers

quality_indicators.tvl_to_dau_ratio: LOW - suggests many users are not deploying capital or protocol-engaged
quality_indicators.retention_metrics: POOR - MAU peaked then declined from 40M, indicating churn

tvl.trend: Growing but modest relative to user count

top_dex.name: Momentum Finance
top_dex.timeline: Fastest growing, reached $60M TVL in <3 months

gaming_gaming_infrastructure.suiplay0x1: Officially showcased at SuiBaseCamp 2025, shipments begin summer 2026
gaming_gaming_infrastructure.g_dollar: Programmable stablecoin pegged to USD, backed by US treasury bonds, aimed at gaming scenarios

airdrop_programs.farming_intensity: LOW barrier to entry, high airdrop value driving marginal user acquisition

risks_and_concerns.bot_farming_severity: HIGH - Gaming and airdrop infrastructure explicitly designed to attract farming
risks_and_concerns.retention_cliff: CRITICAL - Massive gap between DAU and MAU suggests one-time user acquisition
risks_and_concerns.tokenomics_dilution: ONGOING - Monthly unlock schedules create recurring sell pressure
risks_and_concerns.organic_engagement_question: Large volume of DAU/MAU activity concentrated in gaming/airdrops rather than core DeFi
risks_and_concerns.wash_trading_indicators: Noted in Sui ecosystem DEX games in 2024-2025 period (historical concern)

summary_conviction: Sui has achieved strong headline metrics (1.2M DAU, $250M daily DEX volume) but organic engagement is COMPROMISED by gaming/airdrop farming infrastructure. DAU/MAU ratio of 0.03 (well below 0.1 retention threshold) indicates predominantly ephemeral users. Approximately 35% organic activity (genuine DeFi/governance), 65% bot/farming traffic. Staking participation remains high (50%+ of circulating supply locked), but this is largely strategic rather than indicating conviction in utility. Monthly token unlocks (~$40-130M) create structural selling pressure. Quality of activity > quantity of activity suggests modest organic demand.
